phase_history.key_outcome: CR scoped to CI infra: committed osspulse.yml GitHub Actions workflow (cron 1:00 UTC = 08:00 UTC+7) that runs osspulse run and persists .osspulse/state.json via git commit [skip ci]; no src/ changes
11 ACs (V3-002-001..011), 5 BRs, 3 INT, 3 ADDED requirements (new ci-automation capability); spec-auditor PASS, openspec validate PASS
1 ADR (git commit-back persistence w/ force-add + clean-tree guard + [skip ci] + concurrency), workflow skeleton, 0 endpoints, no openapi (no API); no src/ changes; openspec validate PASS

phase_history.note: Pure infra CR: created .github/workflows/osspulse.yml (scheduled cron 0 1 * * *, state persistence via git add -f + [skip ci]), config.toml.ci.example, README section. 6/6 tasks done, 0 src/ changes, YAML valid, all 11 ACs covered.

GO — 11/11 ACs verified via YAML parse + static review. 1 Low bug BUG-1: spurious git push on clean tree (bash ||/&& left-assoc). No empty commit, no red job. YAML valid, 0 src/ changes, no raw secrets.

Release v0.12.0: BUG-1 fixed (bash ||/&& precedence), CHANGELOG prepended, version bumped 0.11.0->0.12.0, YAML valid, committed+pushed on feature/V2-006-discussions, openspec archive completed (ci-automation spec created).

active_concerns: R-1: .osspulse/ AND config.toml both gitignored — must force-add state + commit a secret-free CI config, do NOT un-ignore
AC-004: unchanged state must no-op (no empty commit, no red job) — branch on git diff --quiet
AC-005: [skip ci] + GITHUB_TOKEN push prevents workflow loop; permissions contents:write only
install from source not pip install osspulse (not on PyPI)
persist only state.json; etags.json resets each CI run (accepted)

terminology.state persistence (git commit-back): committing .osspulse/state.json back after each CI run so the next stateless runner is delta-aware
terminology.[skip ci]: commit-message marker + GITHUB_TOKEN push that stops the persistence commit re-triggering the workflow
terminology.force-add: git add -f state.json to stage a gitignored file on CI
